verses.text: Children, obey your parents in the Lord; 'Honour thy father and mother,' the first commandment with promise. Obedience. God blesses the honouring child.
Children, obey your parents in the Lord; 'Honour thy father and mother,' the first commandment with promise. Obedience. God blesses the honouring child.
Children, obey your parents in the Lord; 'Honour thy father and mother,' the first commandment with promise. Obedience. God blesses the honouring child.
Fathers, provoke not your children, but 'bring them up in the nurture and admonition of the Lord.' Godly nurture. Discipline is to be gentle and holy.
Servants, obey your masters 'as unto Christ,' doing God's will from the heart. Heart service. Work is done as unto the Lord.
Servants, obey your masters 'as unto Christ,' doing God's will from the heart. Heart service. Work is done as unto the Lord.
Servants, obey your masters 'as unto Christ,' doing God's will from the heart. Heart service. Work is done as unto the Lord.
Servants, obey your masters 'as unto Christ,' doing God's will from the heart. Heart service. Work is done as unto the Lord.
Masters, forbear threatening; 'your Master also is in heaven,' no respecter of persons. Just masters. They too answer to a higher Lord.
'Be strong in the Lord'; 'we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against... spiritual wickedness.' Unseen war. Our true foe is spiritual, not human.
'Be strong in the Lord'; 'we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against... spiritual wickedness.' Unseen war. Our true foe is spiritual, not human.
'Be strong in the Lord'; 'we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against... spiritual wickedness.' Unseen war. Our true foe is spiritual, not human.
'Take unto you the whole armour of God'; the belt of truth, breastplate of righteousness, feet shod with the gospel. Armed. God equips us to stand.
'Take unto you the whole armour of God'; the belt of truth, breastplate of righteousness, feet shod with the gospel. Armed. God equips us to stand.
'Take unto you the whole armour of God'; the belt of truth, breastplate of righteousness, feet shod with the gospel. Armed. God equips us to stand.
The 'shield of faith' quenches the fiery darts; the helmet of salvation, and 'the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.' Faith and the word. Faith defends, the word attacks.
The 'shield of faith' quenches the fiery darts; the helmet of salvation, and 'the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.' Faith and the word. Faith defends, the word attacks.
Pray always 'with all prayer'; pray for me, that I 'open my mouth boldly.' Prayer essential. The armour is wielded in constant prayer.
Pray always 'with all prayer'; pray for me, that I 'open my mouth boldly.' Prayer essential. The armour is wielded in constant prayer.
Pray always 'with all prayer'; pray for me, that I 'open my mouth boldly.' Prayer essential. The armour is wielded in constant prayer.
Tychicus shall tell my affairs; 'peace... and love with faith' be to the brethren; grace to all that love Christ. Farewell. He closes with peace and grace.
